results.rendered_html:
anantavant (3. a + antavant)
1〉 adj. unendlich.
— 2〉 m. der 2te Fuss Brahmanʼs: catuṣkalaḥ pādo brahmaṇo 'nantavānnāma .. sa ya etamevaṃvidvāṃścatuṣkalaṃ pādaṃ brahmaṇo 'nantavānityupāste 'nantavānasmillo~ke bhavatyanantavato ha lokāñjayati ya etamevaṃvidvāṃścatuṣkalaṃ pādaṃ brahmaṇo 'nantavānityupāste ..  CHĀND. UP. 4,6,3 . 4 .
